privileged_info_summary: The task uses real geographic data from Natural Earth v5.1.2 (public domain dataset). A convex hull of 224 Australian populated places from this dataset spans approximately 113.65°-153.61°E longitude and 42.99°-12.43°S latitude, with an area of approximately 9.36 million square kilometers using the Australian Albers projection (EPSG:3577). This area falls within the expected range of 3-12 million sq km. The task's expected bounding box [110, -45, 160, -10] is larger than the actual convex hull bounds and represents a conservative geographic region encompassing the populated areas.
